_comment: Third-party checkpoint provenance for MAEST inference. Every checkpoint is downloaded at runtime from the upstream URL below (never bundled in this package) and cached by torch.hub under ~/.cache/torch/hub/checkpoints/. sha256/size_bytes were computed 2026-07-11 against the file actually downloaded from each URL (ADOPT campaign, feat/adopt-constitution, P3). When a sha256 is known, vit_helpers.load_pretrained verifies the downloaded file against it and raises on mismatch -- catching a corrupted download or a compromised/replaced mirror before it silently loads into the model.
